message:
feat(python): numpy.ma.masked_inside wrapper parity (franken_numpy-hmy3)

Add fnp_python.masked_inside(x, v1, v2, copy=True) as a passthrough
delegator to np.ma.masked_inside preserving the inclusive interval
[min(v1,v2), max(v1,v2)] masking semantics, copy-flag forwarding,
and MaskedArray return-type contract across integer/float/2-D inputs.

Covered by one pyo3 oracle test with seven scenarios: float v1<v2
basic interval, reversed v1>v2 (must normalize), bounds outside
data range (no mask), bounds covering everything (full mask),
integer dtype, 2-D data, and copy=False forwarded — each
repr-compared to np.ma.masked_inside.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
